description_long: This is a bolt-action rifle with a long, slender wooden stock and a blued steel barrel. The stock features a classic straight comb and a pronounced grip, with visible wood grain and a slightly glossy finish. The barrel is long and tapers toward the muzzle, with iron sights mounted near the end. The receiver area includes a bolt handle and a trigger guard, both made of metal, and the bolt mechanism is clearly visible. The rifle appears to have an internal magazine, with no detachable box or drum visible. The overall design is reminiscent of early to mid-20th century military rifles, with utilitarian metal and wood construction.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock and long blued steel barrel, featuring iron sights and a visible bolt mechanism.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from above, showing the slim profile of the barrel and the straight alignment of the stock.
description_view_1: A side view highlighting the full length of the wooden stock, the bolt handle, trigger guard, and the iron sights on the barrel.
description_view_2: A rear view focusing on the buttstock and grip, with the bolt handle and trigger area visible.
description_view_3: Another side view from the opposite side, showing the length of the barrel, the wooden stock, and the iron sights.
